reason: Resolved: the :whiteout utensil shipped. git.py whiteout (cmd_whiteout) recovers a dirty viewport by preserving the pile on a rescue branch before cleaning; atom.whiteout-utensil.v0 landed on main via PR #419 (rcp.merge.419). Dogfooded live again this session.

Resolved: pr.py land now enforces authorship in code (pr.py:1077-1084) — it refuses when PR author == --by and requires --attest-non-author, recorded on the receipt. Fix atom atom.landing-throughput-resp-authorship-in-code.v0 landed via PR #376. No longer discipline-only.
Stale: the daily arc digest for 2026-06-20, a point-in-time snapshot superseded by later digests (the digest is ephemeral by design). Closing as superseded.

Dead headless run: opened at a value-gate.claude.v1 run's birth (trust rail), but the run never completed — no verdict ever landed for atom.gate-panel.v0 (0 receipts on the log). The 600s stdin-inheritance hang is tracked in #411 (fix in PR #389). Closing the dead run.
